name: Necronomicon
desc: Slime spawns deal 50 Dmg to Boss.

scripts.onD20: if (roll.val > 1 && roll.val < 10) { const slimes = G.grid.filter(t => t && t.val === -1).length; if (slimes > 0) { G.enemy.dealDamage(50 * slimes); G.log('📖 Necronomicon: Burned boss for ' + (50 * slimes) + ' dmg!'); G.fx.stomp('📖', 'NECRONOMICON'); G.fx.flash('rgba(139,92,246,0.3)'); } }

scripts.onTavern: G.player.addGold(30); G.log('💍 Ring of Wealth: +30 Gold!'); G.triggerFX('float', { targetId: 'hud-gold', artifactId: 'RING_WEALTH', icon: '💍', name: 'Ring of Wealth' });

scripts.onEncounterStart: G.player.addSlides(3); G.log('⚡ Boots of Haste: +3 slides!'); G.triggerFX('float', { targetId: 'hud-slides', artifactId: 'BOOTS_HASTE', icon: '⚡', name: 'Boots of Haste' });

scripts.onPurchase: G.player.addMultiplier(0.3); G.triggerFX('pop', { targetId: 'hud-multiplier', artifactId: 'GIANT_POTION', icon: '🧪', name: 'Giant Potion' });

scripts.onSlide: if (G.prng() < 0.02) { G.enemy.dealDamage(200); G.log('⚔️ VORPAL STRIKE!'); G.fx.flash('rgba(244,63,94,0.5)'); G.fx.stomp('⚔️', 'VORPAL STRIKE'); G.shake(1.0); }

if (G.slides <= 0 && !G.state.featherUsed) { G.player.addSlides(5); G.state.featherUsed = true; G.log('🪶 Phoenix Feather: Rebirth!'); G.triggerFX('float', { artifactId: 'PHOENIX_FEATHER', icon: '🪶', name: 'REBIRTH' }); G.shake(0.5); }

scripts.onD20: if (roll.val === 20) { G.log('🛡️ Dragon Scale: CRITICAL POWER!'); G.player.addMultiplier(0.5); G.fx.flash('rgba(250,204,21,0.35)'); G.fx.stomp('🛡️', 'CRIT POWER!'); }

scripts.onMerge: if (G.state.runStats.totalMerges % 20 === 0) { for(let i=0; i<16; i++) if(G.grid[i] && G.grid[i].val < 0) G.clearTile(i); G.log('🌑 Void Orb: Board Cleansed!'); G.fx.flash('rgba(139,92,246,0.3)'); G.triggerFX('aoe', { x: 50, y: 50, color: '#a855f7' }); G.shake(0.6); }

scripts.onMergeDamage: if (val >= 8) { dmg.val += (50 * lvl); G.triggerFX('aoe', { x, y, color: '#f97316' }); }

name: Staff of Power
desc: Chaos Bolt always picks best outcome.

scripts.onSlide: if (G.prng() < 0.1) { G.log('🔩 Immovable Rod blocked a potential hazard!'); G.triggerFX('pop', { artifactId: 'IMMOV_ROD', icon: '🔩', name: 'Immovable Rod' }); }

name: Holy Avenger
desc: Smite dmg x2. Hazards take AOE on cast.

scripts.onCast: dmg.val *= 2; const g = G.grid; for(let i=0; i<16; i++) { if(g[i] && g[i].val < 0) { const _r=Math.floor(i/4), _c=i%4; G.fx.smite(_c*25+12.5, _r*25+12.5); G.clearTile(i); } } G.fx.flash('rgba(253,224,71,0.25)'); G.log('⚔️ Holy Avenger cleansed the board!');

name: Gravity Boots
desc: Slide DOWN deals 1.5x Dmg, UP deals 0.5x.

scripts.onMerge: if (dir === 'DOWN') { G.fx.stomp('🥾', 'GRAVITY BOOTS'); G.triggerFX('aoe', { x, y, color: '#64748b' }); G.shake(0.4); }
